ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "middle_name" TEXT /* Middle name of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the employee */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the employee */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the employee */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the employee */,
  "telephone" TEXT /* Telephone number of the employee */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the employee */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the employee is assigned to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "date_of_termination" TEXT /* Date when the employee was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "termination_reason" TEXT /* Reason for termination (if applicable) */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the employee */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the employee */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the employee (e.g., active, terminated) */,
  "benefits_eligibility" INTEGER /* Whether the employee is eligible for benefits */,
  "benefits_start_date" TEXT /* Start date for benefits */,
  "employee_photo" TEXT /* Binary data for the employee's photo */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's direct supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department */,
  "budget" REAL /* Annual budget allocated to the department */,
  "department_head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department head */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_department_head_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_head_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_movements" (
  "movement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movement event */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being moved */,
  "from_department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the employee is moving from */,
  "to_department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the employee is moving to */,
  "movement_date" TEXT /* Date of the movement */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the movement */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who approved the movement */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date when the movement was approved */,
  "movement_type" TEXT /* Type of movement (e.g., transfer, promotion, demotion) */,
  "movement_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the movement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_movements_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_movements_to_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_movements_from_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_informations" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee the contact information belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the employee */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the employee */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the employee */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the employee */,
  "telephone" TEXT /* Telephone number of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact (e.g., email, phone) */,
  "secondary_email" TEXT /* Secondary email address of the employee */,
  "secondary_telephone" TEXT /* Secondary phone number of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_informations_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "role_level" TEXT /* Level of the role (e.g., admin, manager, user) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the role */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
